title: Compound V cross-model plan review
description: Structured findings returned by an independent cross-model reviewer (e.g. Codex/GPT) over a Compound V plan or manifest. ADVISORY ONLY: the orchestrator arbitrates; the reviewer never has final authority.

verdict.description: endorse = plan is sound; concerns = proceed only after addressing findings; reject = a critical flaw should block dispatch until fixed.

summary.description: One-paragraph independent assessment, in the reviewer's own words.

findings.description: Each finding is a specific, falsifiable objection. Empty array is valid (and honest) when the reviewer finds nothing.

claim.description: The specific objection — what is wrong or risky.

evidence.description: Why the reviewer believes it (a concrete reference to the plan/manifest/repo). Avoid vague assertions.

blind_spots_checked.description: What the reviewer actively tried to refute (so the orchestrator can see coverage, not just hits).
